title: US, Iran agree to 11th-hour truce after Trump apocalyptic threats
summary_full: A two-week ceasefire struck on Tuesday will see Tehran temporarily reopen the vital Strait of Hormuz
summary_public: A two-week ceasefire struck on Tuesday will see Tehran temporarily reopen the vital Strait of Hormuz
